title: SoftwareTeamFabrik Agent Profile
description: Configuration schema for a factory agent. Edit system_prompt to change behaviour.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in CLI output.

model.description: LLM model identifier passed to the provider API.

provider.description: API provider that hosts this model.

capabilities.description: Logical capabilities used by the Competence Manager to assign tasks.

task_labels.description: GitLab issue labels that trigger this agent when running 'factory run'.

max_concurrent_tasks.description: Maximum number of issues this agent can work on simultaneously.

tools.description: Built-in tools made available to this agent during LLM calls.

system_prompt.description: The full system prompt sent to the LLM on every call. Edit freely to change agent behaviour, tone, and output format.

execution_mode.description: 'plan' = one-shot analysis + comment. 'execute' = agentic loop with file tools, writes and commits real code.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature passed to the provider API. Omit to use the provider default. Lower values (e.g. 0.2) produce more deterministic output. Both Anthropic and Mistral cap at 1.0; values above 1.0 are clamped by the router.
